articles.description: With Julian Alvarez's Atletico Madrid future uncertain, European football expert Guillem Balague looks at how pivotal their Champions League run could prove.
articles.title: Julian Alvarez: Champions League could decide striker's future

articles.description: Manchester United defender Lisandro Martinez is sent off after 56 minutes for pulling the hair of Leeds United striker Dominic Calvert-Lewin at Old Trafford.
articles.title: Lisandro Martinez: Manchester Utd defender sent off for hair-pull on Leeds United striker Dominic Calvert-Lewin

articles.description: England captain Ben Stokes says suggestions of a rift with Brendon McCullum have been overstated, but acknowledges he must work with the head coach in a "slightly different way".
articles.title: Ben Stokes says he must work differently with Brendon McCullum

articles.description: BBC Sport charts the remarkable career of Alex McKechnie, who left Scotland to become one of the NBA's top physiotherapists with a reputation of saving basketball careers.
articles.title: NBA: Alex McKechnie on leap of faith that took him to star physio

articles.description: Speaking 10 years on from his retirement aged 26, former England batter James Taylor speaks about how he "should have died" from his heart condition.
articles.title: James Taylor: England batter speaks 10 years after heart problem ended his career aged 26

articles.description: Union Berlin director of football Horst Heldt condemns "insane" sexist abuse directed at new head coach Marie-Louise Eta.
articles.title: Union Berlin: Sexist abuse of Marie-Louise Eta embarrassing - Horst Heldt

articles.description: World champion Peres Jepchirchir withdraws from this month's London Marathon because of an unspecified stress fracture.
articles.title: London Marathon 2026: World champion Peres Jepchirchir withdraws

articles.description: The first trial - which saw members of Maradona's medical team accused of poor care - collapsed after a judge let cameras into the court.
articles.title: Retrial over death of Argentina legend Maradona to begin

articles.description: Manchester United head coach Michael Carrick has problems to solve before his side's crucial trip to Chelsea on Saturday evening.
articles.title: Man Utd: Jeers and defensive crisis - Michael Carrick facing first big test

articles.description: Gary Neville's The Overlap buys Manchester United influencer Mark Goldbridge's YouTube channels.
articles.title: Mark Goldbridge: Gary Neville's The Overlap buys Manchester United influencer's YouTube channels
